caption: A screen recording shows a web browser with several open tabs, including ones titled "True & Learning by Systemantics," "Future of Society by Systemantics," and "Rural Community Food System." The main browser window displays a dark-themed interactive map of interconnected circular nodes containing various images and labels, such as "Rural Community," "Local Food," and "Healthy People." Curved blue lines link these nodes together. In the upper right corner, a small video call window shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt. He remains visible and largely stationary throughout the sequence. The content of the browser window, including the complex node map and the man in the video call, remains consistent across the frames, with no significant changes in action or layout.
